problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.
